creator: george@m5p.com
text: In answer to my original question, I think this IS a different issue than my problem, which was with realtek-re-kmod-1100.00.1402000_1, not version 199.  I think my issue, and me@nanaya.net's issue in comment #56, are probably the same, though.  I've submitted bug #283887 to track that issue.
